segments.text:
Human Papillomavirus (HPV)
CLS-N390 Vaccine: Science and Society

Human Papillomavirus (HPV)
D ouble-stranded DNA
S mall
N on-enveloped
Papillomaviridae family
Genera found in humans and many vertebrates

Targets basal cells of the stratified epithelium
Replicates and may lead to cutaneous infections or cancer
Cannot infect live, healthy skin – must enter through breaks
HPV Targets

>120 strains – many are carcinogenic
HPV Strains

Transmission
Mostly sexually transmitted
Strains that cause warts are stable on dry environment
Strain causing plantar warts known to transfer by walking barefoot on floor after someone with plantar warts – virus stable on surface
Most infections spontaneously resolve
Certain strains are high risk for causing cancer
H 0 varies for strains and based on what disease it causes

Diseases
Disease | HPV type
Common warts | 2, 7, 22
Plantar warts | 1, 2, 4, 63
Flat warts | 3, 10, 28
Anogenital warts | 6, 11, 42, 44 and others
Anal dysplasia (lesions) | 16, 18, 31, 53, 58
Genital cancers | Highest risk:16, 18, 31, 45
Other high-risk: 33, 35, 39, 51, 52, 56, 58, 59
Probably high-risk: 26, 53, 66, 68, 73, 82
Epidermodysplasia verruciformis | more than 15 types
Focal epithelial hyperplasia (mouth) | 13, 32
Mouth papillomas | 6, 7, 11, 16, 32
Oropharyngeal cancer | 16
Verrucous cyst | 60
Laryngeal papillomatosis | 6, 11

HPV Vaccines
Non-infectious subunit vaccine
L1 major capsid protein – created using recombinant DNA technology
Self-assembles into non-infectious, non-oncogenic units – virus-like particles

HPV Vaccines
Gardasil HPV4
(Merck)
Approved by FDA in June 2006
Quadrivalent – 6, 11, 16, 18
Males and females 9-26
Adjuvant – alum
No preservatives or antibiotics
Cervarix HPV2
(GlaxoSmithKline)
Approved by FDA in October 2009
Bivalent – 16, 18
Females 9-25
Adjuvant – aluminum hydroxide
No preservatives or antibiotics
Gardasil HPV9
(Merck)
Approved by FDA in December 2014
9-valent – 6, 11, 16, 18, 31, 45, 52, 58
Males and females 9-45
Adjuvant – alum
No preservatives or antibiotics
Cervical Cancer Rates in United States 1999-2019
